title: cyperus intactus
intro: Cyperus intactus, also known as the kanna or sour grass, is a plant species native to Southern Africa, belonging to the sedge family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Cyperus intactus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of depression. Cyperus intactus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
